name: Workers comp vs suing my employer for toxic fumes— which is better?
description: Comp: quick, no-fault benefits. Lawsuit: harder, higher potential[2].

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs suing my employer for toxic fumes— which is better?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp: quick, no-fault benefits. Lawsuit: harder, higher potential[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp is faster, no-fault with guaranteed medical/wages but no pain damages; lawsuits require negligence proof for higher payouts but riskier. Comp bars suing employer usually[2][6]. Choose comp for security. - Sue third parties like equipment makers. - Comp first, then explore others. Prioritize comp filing for immediate aid, assess negligence with lawyer.
